params.name: Erinyes’ Shackles
params.description: Forged by Atropos, these bronze shackles were used in trials under moonlit Athens. The Erinyes pursued blood crimes until Athena cast her deciding pebble. A symbol of the shift from vengeance to civic justice in ancient law.
